name: Creamed Beef Sauce with Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare noodles as label directs.
2. Meanwhile in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, cook beef, onions and dill until meat is browned.
3. Drain the excess fat if necessary.
4. Stir in undiluted soup, sour cream, water, salt/pepper; cook until heated through.
5. Serve over hot noodles.
6. Makes 4 servings.
